sections.paragraph:
verb לִזְכּוֹת

to win, gain, attain; be acquitted

verb זוכה

be acquitted; purified; credited with

verb להזדכות

be acquitted; be credited; (Army terminology) dispose of equipment and return it to the quartermaster; (in the Talmud) be found innocent

verb לזכות (>>זיכה)

acquit; purify; credit; grant a right

adjective

pure, refined, immaculate, pristine, white; transparent, lily
